headline: Q4 Earnings Outperformers: D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) And The Rest Of The Home Builders Stocks
summary: Wrapping up Q4 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the home builders stocks, including D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) and its peers.
